summary: Implemented spatial gradient palette for position-based vertex coloring (US-075). Created `src/visual/spatialGradient.ts` with `createSpatialGradient`, `sampleGradient`, and `computeVertexColors` functions. Updated terrain shaders (both edge and vertex) to support an optional `aVertexColor` attribute with `uHasVertexColor` uniform guard for fallback. Integrated vertex color computation into the terrain system using x-axis gradient. Added `TERRAIN_ATTRIBUTES` and `OPTIONAL_TERRAIN_ATTRIBUTES` to shader registry. All 57 US-075 tests pass, full suite (1830 tests) passes, build succeeds.
